headline: Assessing GE Vernova (GEV) Valuation After A Strong Multi‑Period Share Price Run
summary: Recent share move and performance snapshot GE Vernova (GEV) shares recently closed at US$985.92, with the stock showing a 0.2% decline on the day and positive returns over the past week, month, past 3 months, year to date, and past year. See our latest analysis for GE Vernova. That small 1 day share price dip sits against a strong run, with the 30 day share price return of 19.16% and 90 day share price return of 53.52% feeding into a very large 1 year total shareholder return of 201.33%.
